title: SessionNotch
description: macOS notch app showing Claude Code sessions needing attention across laptop + Studio
completed: Core library (Event, SessionRegistry, HTTP parser, Config/Secret/Tailscale, NWListener EventServer) built + tested (28 tests)
Bash Claude Code hook client (Notification/Stop/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/SessionEnd) + idempotent install script + tests
Notch UI: centered island dropping from the notch, content below the camera cutout (never occluded), yellow/red dots, clear-all x, idle collapses to just the notch
Running live on the laptop; Studio + laptop hooks enabled (both machines' Claude sessions drive the notch); auto-start LaunchAgent
Built via Studio+Laptop Claude coordination over Linear BUI-222; both agents co-signed; James approved on real screen
next: Optional: make 'done' (finished-turn) alerts auto-clear so they don't linger
Follow-ups: sub-second ts, 400 on malformed HTTP, EventServer empty-secret guard in the server itself
v2: claude wrapper for true crash detection; jump-to-session
